title: rubus corylifolius var. laciniatus
intro: Rubus corylifolius var. laciniatus, also known as the laciniated Himalayan raspberry, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region with its unique features of having deeply divided leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its active compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus corylifolius var. laciniatus include its potential in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
